name: Graham Wafer Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together sugar, cocoa, and egg.
2. Melt the 1/2 cup butter and add the sugar mixture. Cook for 1 minute until well blended.
3. Break up 1/2 package of graham wafers in a bowl and pour over the mixture. Mix well.
4. Pack into a greased 8x8 pan, pressing down well with the back of a spoon.
5. Chill.
6. Make icing by mixing together 1 1/2 cups powdered sugar, 1 tablespoon butter, 2 tablespoons cocoa, and enough hot water to spread.
7. Spread the icing on the squares and enjoy.
(Note: Break up the wafers before preparing the main mixture.)
